data.title: 16 suspects arrested in South Korea for $28M hacking of crypto and bank accounts, including targeting K-pop star Jungkook and Korean investors.
data.description: Authorities in Seoul have apprehended a total of 16 individuals in connection with a large-scale theft amounting to $28 million from both cryptocurrency and bank accounts. The suspects specifically targeted prominent South Korean pop star Jungkook from the band BTS, as well as several affluent investors in the country.

data.title: Parisians celebrate Chinese Qixi Festival at Darry Ring store; couples embrace tradition with red-string ritual.
data.description: On August 29, in Paris, a large gathering of Parisians convened outside the Darry Ring flagship store at the Louvre to commemorate the Chinese Qixi Festival. This festival, known as the "Chinese Valentine’s Day," is steeped in the tale of the Cowherd and the Weaver Girl. Celebrants flocked to Darry Ring's store to engage in the brand’s red-string ritual, a symbolic gesture connected to love in Chinese tradition. Among them, an international couple shared their experience.
